tree.name: Mikal Bridges
tree.tradeDescription: NYK traded Bogdanovic, Diakite, Shake Milton, 2025 1st (NYK own), 2025 1st (MIL own via NYK), 2025 2nd (BRK own), 2027 1st (NYK own), 2028 1st swap, 2029 1st (NYK own), 2031 1st (NYK own) to BKN for Mikal Bridges, Keita Bates-Diop, Juan Pablo Vaulet, and a 2026 2nd.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bojan Bogdanovic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded Ryan Arcidiacono, Malachi Flynn, Evan Fournier, Quentin Grimes and cash to Detroit for Bojan Bogdanovic and Alec Burks

assetsGivenUp.name: Evan Fournier
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded cash to Boston for Evan Fournier and a 2023 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Cash sent to Boston for Fournier

assetsGivenUp.name: Quentin Grimes
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded Keon Johnson (#21) to LAC for Quentin Grimes (#25) and a 2024 2nd (DET own)

assetsGivenUp.name: Keon Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 21st overall by NYK in 2021

assetsGivenUp.name: Malachi Flynn
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK sent RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley, and a 2024 2nd (DET own) to TOR for OG Anunoby, Precious Achiuwa, and Malachi Flynn.

assetsGivenUp.name: RJ Barrett
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 3rd overall by NYK in 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: Immanuel Quickley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team draft-night trade: NYK traded a 2020 1st to MIN; OKC traded Immanuel Quickley (#25) to NYK

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#23)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2020 1st round pick, traded to Minnesota in the 3-team draft-night deal

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via DET
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from LAC in the Keon Johnson/Quentin Grimes draft-night trade. Originally DET's 2024 2nd. Sent to Toronto in OG trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Keon Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 21st overall by NYK in 2021

assetsGivenUp.name: Ryan Arcidiacono
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Cash sent to Detroit

assetsGivenUp.name: Mamadi Diakite
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent
assetsGivenUp.note: Salary filler in Bridges trade. Signed March 25, 2024.

assetsGivenUp.name: Shake Milton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed and immediately included in Bridges trade as salary filler

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#26) via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own first-round pick, unprotected, sent to BKN in Bridges trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#19) via MIL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Detroit in the Jalen Duren/Kemba Walker trade. Originally Milwaukee's conditional 1st. Sent to BKN in Bridges trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jalen Duren
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded 2023 1st (DEN own), three 2023 2nd round picks (OKC own, UTA own, NYK own), and a 2024 2nd (NYK own) to Charlotte for Jalen Duren (#13). Then traded Duren + Kemba Walker to DET on July 6, 2022 for this MIL 2025 1st.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#27)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Denver's 2023 1st round pick, acquired by NYK in a prior trade, sent to Charlotte for Jalen Duren

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#41)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: OKC's 2023 2nd round pick, sent to Charlotte for Duren

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#34)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Utah's 2023 2nd round pick, sent to Charlotte for Duren

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#39)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2023 2nd round pick, sent to Charlotte for Duren

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2024 2nd round pick, sent to Charlotte for Duren

assetsGivenUp.name: Kemba Walker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent. Sent to DET alongside Duren for MIL 2025 1st on July 6, 2022.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick via BRK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Atlanta in the Cam Reddish trade. Originally Brooklyn's 2025 2nd. Sent to BKN in Bridges trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Knox
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of Kevin Knox + CHA 2022 1st trade to ATL for Reddish + BRK 2025 2nd
assetsGivenUp.note: This 2nd was part of the return for Kevin Knox in the Cam Reddish trade with ATL

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own first-round pick, unprotected, sent to BKN in Bridges trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 1st Round Pick Swap Rights
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: BKN gains right to swap 2028 first-round picks with NYK

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own first-round pick, unprotected, sent to BKN in Bridges trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick via NYK
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own first-round pick, unprotected, sent to BKN in Bridges trade
